inputs.label: Weight Loss per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Average weight lost during the loss phase of one cycle

businessContext_i18n.en: Average weight lost during the loss phase of one cycle
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir döngünün kayıp aşamasında kaybedilen ortalama kilo

inputs.label: Weight Regain per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Average weight regained during the regain phase of one cycle

inputs.label: Cycle Duration
inputs.businessContext: Average duration of one complete diet cycle (loss + regain)

businessContext_i18n.en: Average duration of one complete diet cycle (loss + regain)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir tam diyet döngüsünün ortalama süresi (kayıp + geri kazanım)
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Dauer eines vollständigen Diätzyklus (Verlust + Zunahme)
